# sitecoreauthoring_item_field (Resource)

Manages a single field value on an existing Sitecore item using the Authoring API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sitecoreauthoring_item" "webhook" {
  path = "/sitecore/system/Workflows/Sample Workflow/Awaiting Approval/Approve/Webhook"
}

resource "sitecoreauthoring_item_field" "webhook" {
  item_id     = data.sitecoreauthoring_item.webhook.item.item_id
  language    = "en"
  field_name  = "Url"
  field_value = "https://my-webhook-in-terraform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `field_name` (String) The name of the field to update.
- `field_value` (String) The value to set for the field.
- `item_id` (String) The ID of the item.
- `language` (String) The language of the item.

### Optional

- `database` (String) The database where the item is stored (default: master).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the item field resource.
